name: Shift Burden of Proof in Fraud Cases

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers facing IRS allegations of civil tax fraud; the taxpayer can prevail by showing the IRS failed to meet its higher burden of proof.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: In any Tax Court proceeding where the IRS alleges fraud with intent to evade tax, the burden of proof is placed on the Secretary (IRS) rather than the taxpayer.
